en: Therefore, since we have been justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 所以，我們既然因信稱義，就藉著我們的主耶穌基督與 神和好；

en: Through him we have also obtained access by faith into this grace in which we stand, and we rejoice in hope of the glory of God.
zh: 我們也憑著信，藉著他可以進入現在所站的這恩典中，並且以盼望得享 神的榮耀為榮。

en: More than that, we rejoice in our sufferings, knowing that suffering produces endurance,
zh: 不但這樣，我們更以患難為榮；知道患難產生忍耐，

en: and endurance produces character, and character produces hope,
zh: 忍耐產生毅力，毅力產生盼望；

en: and hope does not put us to shame, because God's love has been poured into our hearts through the Holy Spirit who has been given to us.
zh: 盼望是不會令人蒙羞的，因為 神藉著所賜給我們的聖靈，把他的愛澆灌在我們的心裡。

en: For while we were still weak, at the right time Christ died for the ungodly.
zh: 當我們還軟弱的時候，基督就照所定的日期，為不敬虔的人死了。

en: For one will scarcely die for a righteous person- though perhaps for a good person one would dare even to die-
zh: 為義人死，是少有的；為好人死，或有敢作的；

en: but God shows his love for us in that while we were still sinners, Christ died for us.
zh: 唯有基督在我們還作罪人的時候為我們死， 神對我們的愛就在此顯明了。

en: Since, therefore, we have now been justified by his blood, much more shall we be saved by him from the wrath of God.
zh: 所以，我們現在既然因他的血稱義，就更要藉著他免受 神的忿怒。

en: For if while we were enemies we were reconciled to God by the death of his Son, much more, now that we are reconciled, shall we be saved by his life.
zh: 我們作仇敵的時候，尚且藉著 神兒子的死與他復和，既然復和了，就更要因他的生得救了！

en: More than that, we also rejoice in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, through whom we have now received reconciliation.
zh: 不但這樣，我們現在已經藉著我們的主耶穌基督與 神復和，也藉著他以 神為榮。

en: Therefore, just as sin came into the world through one man, and death through sin, and so death spread to all men because all sinned-
zh: 正好像罪藉著一個人入了世界，死又是從罪來的，所以死就臨到所有人，因為所有人都犯了罪。

en: for sin indeed was in the world before the law was given, but sin is not counted where there is no law.
zh: 沒有律法以前，罪已經在世界上了；不過，沒有律法的時候，罪也不算罪。

en: Yet death reigned from Adam to Moses, even over those whose sinning was not like the transgression of Adam, who was a type of the one who was to come.
zh: 可是，從亞當到摩西，死就掌權了，甚至那些不像亞當那樣犯罪的人，也在死的權下；亞當正是要來的那一位的預表。

en: But the free gift is not like the trespass. For if many died through one man's trespass, much more have the grace of God and the free gift by the grace of that one man Jesus Christ abounded for many.
zh: 但恩賞和過犯是截然不同的；如果因著那一人的過犯，眾人都死了， 神的恩典和這一人耶穌基督在恩典裡的賞賜，對眾人就更加豐盛了。

en: And the free gift is not like the result of that one man's sin. For the judgment following one trespass brought condemnation, but the free gift following many trespasses brought justification.
zh: 這賞賜和那一人犯罪的後果也是不同的；因為審判是由一人而來，以致定罪，恩賞卻由許多過犯而來，以致稱義。

en: If, because of one man's trespass, death reigned through that one man, much more will those who receive the abundance of grace and the free gift of righteousness reign in life through the one man Jesus Christ.
zh: 如果因著那一人的過犯，死就因那一人而掌權，那些蒙豐富的恩典並且得公義為賞賜的，就更要因這一位耶穌基督在生命中掌權了。

en: Therefore, as one trespass led to condemnation for all men, so one act of righteousness leads to justification and life for all men.
zh: 這樣看來，因一次的過犯，所有人都被定罪；照樣，因一次的義行，所有人都被稱義得生命了。

en: For as by the one man's disobedience the many were made sinners, so by the one man's obedience the many will be made righteous.
zh: 因著那一人的悖逆，眾人就被列為罪人；照樣，因著這一人的順服，眾人也被列為義人了。

en: Now the law came in to increase the trespass, but where sin increased, grace abounded all the more,
zh: 律法的出現，是要叫過犯增多；然而罪在哪裡增多，恩典就更加增多了。

en: so that, as sin reigned in death, grace also might reign through righteousness leading to eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.
zh: 罪藉著死掌權；照樣，恩典也藉著義掌權，使人藉著我們的主耶穌基督進入永生。
